ingredients: 2 tbsp capers, drained and finely chopped
Vegetable or sunflower oil, for frying
Salt and black pepper, to taste
steps: Slice squid into rings about 1/2 cm thick.
Season flour well and mix in chopped capers. Coat squid in the flour mixture and shake off excess.
Mix garlic into mayonnaise for a quick dipping sauce.
Heat frying oil in a deep pan (no more than one-third full). Fry squid in batches about 3 minutes until crisp and lightly golden.
Drain on paper towels and serve immediately with garlic mayo and lemon wedges.
tips: Keep squid dry before coating; fry hot and fast so it stays tender and crisp.
